SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HILL, OLIVER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KEYOPP PROPERTY MANAGEMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REMARK: RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON 3/26/26. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT OLIVER HALL. RETURN TO SENDER: UNDELIVERABLE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-16-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-16-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDRICKS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF OLIVER HILL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KEYOPP PROPERTY MANAGEMENT IS PRESENT, APPEARING IN COURT IS LAWRENCE LEUNG. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
